entries.source: Reading knowledge plus formal speech routines
entries.value: Ujuzi wa kusoma pamoja na taratibu rasmi za usemi
Uko tayari kwa ukaguzi wa dakika 10
Majeraha ya hivi karibuni ya kisiasa bado ni mabichi

entries.source: Recognition is useful, but it is weaker evidence than applying the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Utambuzi ni muhimu, lakini ni ushahidi dhaifu kuliko kutumia wazo bila kuwa na jibu mbele yako.

entries.source: Recommend opening questions for this encounter, grouped by interview, debate, contradiction, and legacy.
entries.value: Pendekeza maswali ya kuanzia kwa mkutano huu, yaliyopangwa kwa mahojiano, mjadala, utata, na urithi.

entries.source: Reconstruct a decision, alternatives, constraints, and outcomes.
entries.value: Jenga upya uamuzi, njia mbadala, vikwazo, na matokeo.

entries.source: Red sandstone heat, ink, perfumed paper, controlled silence, and many languages orbiting power.
entries.value: Joto la mawe mekundu, wino, karatasi yenye manukato, ukimya uliodhibitiwa, na lugha nyingi zinazozunguka mamlaka.

entries.source: Reframe my next question as a student trying to understand the mental model, not just the biography.
entries.value: Badilisha swali langu linalofuata kama mwanafunzi anayejaribu kuelewa mtindo wa kiakili, si wasifu tu.
Mjadala wa kidini una uzito wa kisiasa
Kufanya kazi kwa mbali ni bora

entries.source: Remove weak, generic, or low-fit ideas quickly.
entries.value: Ondoa mawazo dhaifu, ya jumla, au yasiyofaa haraka.

entries.source: Removes the failing path instead of understanding it.
entries.value: Huondoa njia inayofeli badala ya kuielewa.
Badilisha jina la kigezo kila mahali.

entries.source: Repairing the misconception makes the next problem easier instead of just more familiar.
entries.value: Kurekebisha dhana potofu hufanya tatizo linalofuata kuwa rahisi badala ya kuwa la kawaida tu.

entries.source: Repeating a definition without applying it can feel fluent while hiding gaps.
entries.value: Kurudia ufafanuzi bila kuutumia kunaweza kuonekana kama ufasaha huku kukificha mapengo.

entries.source: Rephrase the active question in simpler language. Ask only one question.
entries.value: Badilisha swali linalotumika kwa lugha rahisi. Uliza swali moja tu.
Omba muhtasari na muhuri wa pasipoti

entries.source: Reset the controls, move only one slider, and describe the before-and-after in plain language.
entries.value: Weka upya vidhibiti, sogeza kitelezi kimoja tu, na ueleze hali ya kabla na baada kwa lugha rahisi.

entries.source: Resolve the event clock before opening the world
entries.value: Tatua saa ya tukio kabla ya kufungua ulimwengu
mhoji ambaye ana heshima lakini anatoa changamoto

entries.source: Restaurants and drivers can be suppliers, but this specific clue is about customers comparing and switching.
entries.value: Migahawa na madereva wanaweza kuwa wauzaji, lakini dokezo hili mahususi linahusu wateja wanaolinganisha na kubadili huduma.

entries.source: Restoration London faces plague memory, dense timber housing, and a fire that will reshape the city.
entries.value: London ya kipindi cha Urekebishaji inakabiliwa na kumbukumbu ya tauni, nyumba za mbao zilizobanana, na moto utakaobadilisha sura ya jiji.

entries.source: Reveal the starting model before the lesson explains it.
entries.value: Fichua kielelezo cha kuanzia kabla ya somo kukielezea.

entries.source: Rewrite the current rough section as a suggested edit. Show what changed and why before asking me to merge it.
entries.value: Andika upya sehemu ya sasa iliyo mbaya kama marekebisho yaliyopendekezwa. Onyesha kilichobadilika na kwa nini kabla ya kuniomba nikiunganishe.

entries.source: Right. Transfer to a fresh example is stronger evidence than recognition.
entries.value: Sawa. Uhamisho kwenye mfano mpya ni ushahidi thabiti zaidi kuliko utambuzi.

entries.source: Right. You identified a seller-side cost shock and predicted the pressure on price.
entries.value: Sawa. Umetambua mshtuko wa gharama kwa upande wa muuzaji na kutabiri shinikizo kwa bei.

entries.source: Roman trade used amphorae and contracts
entries.value: Biashara ya Roma ilitumia mitungi ya amphorae na mikataba
Uvumi unaweza kugeuka dhidi ya wageni
Uvumi kuhusu wanajeshi wa kifalme ulienea

entries.source: Rumors move faster than verified news
entries.value: Uvumi husambaa kwa kasi zaidi kuliko habari zilizothibitishwa
Rupee, dam, zawadi, wajibu wa ulinzi

entries.source: Rupees, silver coin, credit through trusted households
entries.value: Rupee, sarafu ya fedha, mikopo kupitia kaya zinazoaminika

entries.source: Safe, explanatory, and easier to pause for context.
entries.value: Salama, yenye maelezo, na rahisi kusitisha kwa muktadha.

entries.source: Safer, more explanatory, and allowed to ask modern comparisons.
entries.value: Salama zaidi, yenye maelezo zaidi, na inayoruhusu kuuliza ulinganisho wa kisasa.

entries.source: Salt air, olive oil, rope fiber, shouted accounts, and the heavy logistics behind imperial abundance.
entries.value: Hewa ya chumvi, mafuta ya zeituni, nyuzi za kamba, akaunti zilizopigwa kelele, na vifaa vizito nyuma ya wingi wa kifalme.

entries.source: Salt March strategist, St. Helena retrospective, 1946 committee room...
entries.value: Mkakati wa Msafara wa Chumvi, tathmini ya St. Helena, chumba cha kamati cha 1946...

entries.source: Say why the mistake is tempting, then name the missing link.
entries.value: Eleza kwa nini kosa hilo linashawishi, kisha taja kiungo kinachokosekana.

entries.source: Saying revenue is up, so the company is worth more ignores margins, reinvestment, working capital, and risk.
entries.value: Kusema kuwa mapato yameongezeka, kwa hivyo kampuni ina thamani zaidi, kunapuuza pembezoni, uwekezaji upya, mtaji wa kufanyia kazi, na hatari.
Sayansi, uongozi, demokrasia, maisha ya kila siku...

entries.source: Seeing the output change but not naming the mechanism.
entries.value: Kuona matokeo yakibadilika lakini bila kutaja utaratibu wake.

entries.source: Set a place, period, and mission. Your guide will keep the trip bounded to the era and mark speculation clearly.
entries.value: Weka mahali, kipindi, na dhamira. Mwongozo wako utaweka safari ndani ya mipaka ya enzi hiyo na kuashiria uvumi kwa uwazi.

entries.source: Set a thinking target and I will ask the first diagnostic question.
entries.value: Weka lengo la kufikiri nami nitauliza swali la kwanza la utambuzi.

entries.source: Several locations, figures, artifacts, and field notes.
entries.value: Maeneo kadhaa, watu, vizalia, na madokezo ya nyanjani.

entries.source: Short factual notes clarify uncertainty, bias, and interpretation.
entries.value: Vidokezo vifupi vya kweli hufafanua kutokuwa na uhakika, upendeleo, na tafsiri.

entries.source: Short summaries keep both sides aligned before moving on.
entries.value: Muhtasari mfupi huweka pande zote mbili katika maelewano kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Should a company enter this market?
entries.value: Je, kampuni inapaswa kuingia katika soko hili?

entries.source: Show more uncertainty, anachronism, and source-boundary notes.
entries.value: Onyesha kutokuwa na uhakika zaidi, anachronism, na vidokezo vya mipaka ya chanzo.

entries.source: Show the person's major beliefs at this time, their blind spots, and what they would likely resist understanding.
entries.value: Onyesha imani kuu za mtu huyo wakati huu, mapungufu yake, na kile ambacho angepinga kukielewa.

entries.source: Sketch the outline, sections, or table before polishing language.
entries.value: Chora muhtasari, sehemu, au jedwali kabla ya kuboresha lugha.

entries.source: Small nudges arrive before direct explanations.
entries.value: Vidokezo vidogo huja kabla ya maelezo ya moja kwa moja.

entries.source: Small reserve in local coin or credit
entries.value: Akiba ndogo katika sarafu ya ndani au mkopo
Akiba ndogo ya fedha au shaba

entries.source: Socrates was tried and executed in 399 BCE
entries.value: Socrates alihukumiwa na kunyongwa mwaka 399 KK

entries.source: someone who changed education and faced serious opposition
entries.value: mtu aliyebadilisha elimu na kukabili upinzani mkali

entries.source: Sources, confidence, uncertainty, and forbidden quotes.
entries.value: Vyanzo, ujasiri, kutokuwa na uhakika, na nukuu zilizopigwa marufuku.
Uchunguzi wa anga, historia ya India, aljebra...

entries.source: Specific prices vary by evidence and period
entries.value: Bei mahususi hutofautiana kulingana na ushahidi na kipindi

entries.source: Specific private opinions of unnamed residents
entries.value: Maoni mahususi ya kibinafsi ya wakazi wasiojulikana

entries.source: Split work into AI-owned, user-owned, and shared moves.
entries.value: Gawanya kazi katika hatua zinazomilikiwa na AI, zinazomilikiwa na mtumiaji, na zinazoshirikiwa.
Kanisa Kuu la St Paul liliharibiwa

entries.source: Stage the person, year, room, and relationship.
entries.value: Weka mazingira ya mtu, mwaka, chumba, na uhusiano.

entries.source: Standing idle with strange questions during a disaster invites suspicion.
entries.value: Kusimama bila kufanya kazi na kuuliza maswali ya ajabu wakati wa janga huleta mashaka.

entries.source: Start a Time Travel expedition. Do not open a generic chat and do not write a broad period summary.
entries.value: Anza safari ya Kusafiri kwa Wakati. Usifungue gumzo la kawaida na usiandike muhtasari mpana wa kipindi.

entries.source: Start with a concept, case, argument, decision, or text.
entries.value: Anza na dhana, kesi, hoja, uamuzi, au maandishi.

entries.source: Start with a question, not a lecture.
Start with a tiny lesson, one check question, a mastery meter, and wait for my answer before continuing.
entries.value: Anza na somo dogo, swali moja la kukagua, mita ya umahiri, na usubiri jibu langu kabla ya kuendelea.

entries.source: Start with an era passport, a vivid arrival scene, three choices for what to do next, and a compact timeline log.
entries.value: Anza na pasipoti ya enzi, tukio zuri la kuwasili, chaguzi tatu za nini cha kufanya baadaye, na logi fupi ya matukio.

entries.source: Start with one specific question or task.
entries.value: Anza na swali au kazi moja mahususi.

entries.source: State the idea in one sentence so it can be tested.
entries.value: Eleza wazo hilo katika sentensi moja ili liweze kujaribiwa.

entries.source: State your starting idea so the tutor has something to test.
entries.value: Eleza wazo lako la kuanzia ili mwalimu awe na kitu cha kujaribu.

entries.source: Stateful exploration with consequences and evolving risk.
entries.value: Uchunguzi wenye hali na matokeo pamoja na hatari zinazobadilika.

entries.source: Step by step, brainstorm first, solve together...
entries.value: Hatua kwa hatua, fanya ubongo kwanza, tatua pamoja...

entries.source: Step out of character briefly. Explain the historical context, evidence quality, and uncertainties behind the last exchange.
entries.value: Ondoka kwenye uhusika kwa muda mfupi. Eleza muktadha wa kihistoria, ubora wa ushahidi, na kutokuwa na uhakika nyuma ya mazungumzo ya mwisho.

entries.source: Stone dust, wool dye, bells, and sharp political glances under a crowded square.
entries.value: Vumbi la mawe, rangi ya sufu, kengele, na mitazamo mikali ya kisiasa chini ya uwanja wenye watu wengi.

entries.source: Stop editing directly for this turn. Give concise advice and one practical next move.
entries.value: Acha kuhariri moja kwa moja kwa zamu hii. Toa ushauri mfupi na hatua moja ya vitendo inayofuata.

entries.source: Stopped. Send another message whenever you are ready.
entries.value: Imesitishwa. Tuma ujumbe mwingine wakati wowote utakapokuwa tayari.

entries.source: Strict mode keeps modern knowledge out of the world and applies social consequences sooner.
entries.value: Hali ya ukali huweka maarifa ya kisasa nje ya ulimwengu na kutumia matokeo ya kijamii mapema zaidi.

entries.source: Strong writing is a chain of claim, reason, evidence, and consequence. Each sentence should do a job in that chain.
entries.value: Uandishi imara ni mnyororo wa madai, sababu, ushahidi, na matokeo. Kila sentensi inapaswa kufanya kazi katika mnyororo huo.
Mwanafunzi, mpinzani, mwandishi wa habari, raia...

entries.source: Substitutes are alternatives like cooking or pickup. Comparing apps is buyer leverage inside the category.
entries.value: Mbadala ni njia nyingine kama kupika au kuchukua chakula. Kulinganisha programu ni nguvu ya mnunuzi ndani ya kategoria.

entries.source: Suggest candidates with strong evidence and vivid settings.
entries.value: Pendekeza wagombea wenye ushahidi thabiti na mazingira wazi.

entries.source: Supply shifts left and price tends to rise.
entries.value: Usambazaji hupungua na bei huelekea kupanda.
rika anayesaidia na mwenza katika ujenzi

entries.source: Take the first pass on the shared artifact. Make the structure visible, mark assumptions, and ask me to accept, edit, or reject.
entries.value: Fanya jaribio la kwanza kwenye kifaa kilichoshirikiwa. Fanya muundo uonekane, weka alama kwenye dhana, na uniombe nikubali, nihariri, au nikatae.

entries.source: Tang Chang'an is a cosmopolitan imperial capital linked to steppe, Central Asian, and Buddhist networks.
entries.value: Tang Chang'an ni mji mkuu wa kifalme wa kimataifa uliounganishwa na nyika, Asia ya Kati, na mitandao ya Kibudha.
Dola ya Tang chini ya Mfalme Xuanzong

entries.source: Target: one sentence describing the learning target.
entries.value: Lengo: sentensi moja inayoelezea lengo la kujifunza.

entries.source: That catches the revenue movement, but misses the margin and cash timing links. Sales alone do not prove cash flow improved.
entries.value: Hiyo inakamata mienendo ya mapato, lakini inakosa viungo vya pembezoni na muda wa pesa taslimu. Mauzo pekee hayathibitishi kuwa mtiririko wa pesa umeimarika.

entries.source: That may hide the symptom, but it does not teach you where the data flow broke.
entries.value: Hiyo inaweza kuficha dalili, lakini haikufundishi mahali ambapo mtiririko wa data ulikwama.

entries.source: The assistant must identify known facts before simulating
entries.value: Msaidizi lazima atambue ukweli unaojulikana kabla ya kuiga

entries.source: The Athenian agora was a civic center
entries.value: Agora ya Athene ilikuwa kituo cha kiraia

entries.source: The explanation that links evidence back to the claim.
The final summary waits until you have done real thinking.
entries.value: Muhtasari wa mwisho unasubiri hadi utakapofanya fikra za kweli.

entries.source: The first scene should become concrete only after the destination is resolved.
entries.value: Tukio la kwanza linapaswa kuwa thabiti tu baada ya mahali pa kwenda kuamuliwa.

entries.source: The Indian Rebellion of 1857 has made Delhi a contested imperial and military space.
entries.value: Uasi wa India wa 1857 umeifanya Delhi kuwa nafasi ya kifalme na kijeshi yenye utata.

entries.source: The learner can connect a variable change to an outcome.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kuunganisha mabadiliko ya vigezo na matokeo.

entries.source: The learner can explain the key link in their own words.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kuelezea kiungo kikuu kwa maneno yake mwenyewe.

entries.source: The learner can identify and fix the misconception.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kutambua na kurekebisha dhana potofu.

entries.source: The learner can make a first prediction.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anaweza kufanya utabiri wa kwanza.

entries.source: The learner explains it back in their own words.
entries.value: Mwanafunzi anafafanua upya kwa maneno yake mwenyewe.

entries.source: The longest sentence, because shorter is always stronger.
entries.value: Sentensi ndefu zaidi, kwa sababu fupi daima ni imara zaidi.

entries.source: The person should not know future events unless you explicitly open modern confrontation.
entries.value: Mtu hapaswi kujua matukio ya baadaye isipokuwa kama utafungua wazi makabiliano ya kisasa.

entries.source: The Roman Empire under Trajan's final year depends on ports, credit, labor, and imperial logistics.
entries.value: Dola ya Roma katika mwaka wa mwisho wa Trajan inategemea bandari, mikopo, nguvu kazi, na usafirishaji wa kifalme.

entries.source: The scene is being established by the dossier.
entries.value: Eneo linawekwa na faili la taarifa.

entries.source: The simulation will prioritize different people, risks, objects, and explanations.
entries.value: Uigaji utatanguliza watu, hatari, vitu, na maelezo tofauti.

entries.source: The title, because every weak paragraph has a weak title.
entries.value: Kichwa cha habari, kwa sababu kila aya dhaifu ina kichwa dhaifu.

entries.source: The Travel Designer should resolve this intent into a specific historical place, date, and political moment before arrival.
entries.value: Mbuni wa Safari anapaswa kutatua nia hii kuwa mahali mahususi pa kihistoria, tarehe, na wakati wa kisiasa kabla ya kuwasili.

entries.source: The version of a person matters more than the name.
entries.value: Toleo la mtu ni muhimu zaidi kuliko jina.

entries.source: The West Market hosted long-distance trade
entries.value: Soko la Magharibi liliandaa biashara ya masafa marefu

entries.source: This is the evidence checkpoint. You advance only by showing the skill.
entries.value: Hiki ni kituo cha ukaguzi cha ushahidi. Unasonga mbele kwa kuonyesha ujuzi tu.

entries.source: This lets you explain why a model moves instead of just copying formulas.
entries.value: Hii inakuwezesha kuelezea kwa nini modeli inasonga badala ya kunakili fomula tu.

entries.source: Time slice: not chosen yet. If a specific person is named, offer 4 to 5 historically meaningful versions of this person before any in-character dialogue. Explain how each version changes the worldview, stakes, and setting.
entries.value: Kipindi cha muda: hakijachaguliwa bado. Ikiwa mtu mahususi ametajwa, toa matoleo 4 hadi 5 ya kihistoria ya mtu huyu kabla ya mazungumzo yoyote ya uhusika. Eleza jinsi kila toleo linavyobadilisha mtazamo wa ulimwengu, hatari, na mazingira.

entries.source: Titles matter, but this clue points to reasoning inside the paragraph.
entries.value: Vichwa vya habari ni muhimu, lakini dokezo hili linaelekeza kwenye hoja ndani ya aya.

entries.source: Trace a trade route on the map
entries.value: Fuatilia njia ya biashara kwenye ramani

entries.source: trace cause and effect in code
entries.value: fuatilia sababu na matokeo katika msimbo

entries.source: Track accepted changes, rejected changes, and the next edit.
entries.value: Fuatilia mabadiliko yaliyokubaliwa, yaliyokataliwa, na uhariri unaofuata.

entries.source: Track decisions and open questions. Preserve my voice in writing tasks. Ask at most one practical question if context is missing.
entries.value: Fuatilia maamuzi na maswali yaliyo wazi. Hifadhi sauti yangu katika kazi za uandishi. Uliza swali moja la kivitendo ikiwa muktadha haupo.
Misemo ya kibiashara pamoja na msamiati wa nyumbani
